productName: .5g Isolated Pre-Rolled Cones, 2ct - Isolated Crop CircleZ Pre-Rolled Cones - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps crop circleZ flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
